claim: Ticketmaster.be is the official primary ticket platform for concerts in Belgium, listing 142 events for the 2026-27 season including major arena tours.
quote: Concerts | Tickets in 2026-27 | Events, Dates & Information

claim: Greenhouse Talent is an independent international concert and comedy promoter with offices in Ghent, programming acts like Jason Derulo (Feb 18, 2026, ING Arena) and Avatar (Mar 8, 2026, Capitole).
quote: Greenhouse Talent is an independent, international concert and comedy promoter, booking agency and festival organizer with offices in Ghent (Belgium) and Breda (Netherlands).

claim: Live Nation Belgium handles ticketing and presales for major 2026 tours including J. Cole's Fall-Off Tour (Oct 17), NE-YO & AKON (May 17) and Capitole Gent listings.
quote: Live Nation Belgium · Upcoming Events, Tickets & News

claim: Rock Werchter 2026 single day tickets cost €140 and the 4-day combi pass €315, both prices including service fees, mobility and eco contribution plus a complimentary train ticket.
quote: Combi festival ticket (valid from 2 to 5 July): 315 euros ... Thursday 2 July: 140 euros ... All prices mentioned include service fees, mobility contributions, and eco contributions.

claim: Tomorrowland Belgium 2026 day passes start around €138 and the 3-day Full Madness pass exceeds €300, with sales typically selling out within minutes of the global sale.
quote: A Tomorrowland 2026 day pass costs €138 ... Full Madness Pass: 3-day access (Expect to shell out €300+)

claim: Opera Ballet Vlaanderen has no dress code and tickets start at €15, with last-minute discounts of €10 for those 25 and under.
quote: There is no dress code. The days of attending the opera in rustling ball gowns or tuxedos are long past.

claim: Opera tickets can be purchased online at operaballet.be or in person at Opera Gent Tuesday-Saturday 2-6 PM, with a desk also opening 75 minutes before each performance — same-week booking is realistic for many shows.
quote: tickets can also be purchased at Opera Gent Tuesday to Saturday from 2 PM to 6 PM and 75 minutes before the start of each performance

claim: West End musical tickets in London average around £50 and are bookable months or even years ahead, with selected productions currently selling into 2027 and same-day discount tickets often available.
quote: Many West End musicals are available to book months or even years ahead, with selected productions currently booking well into 2027 ... £50 is an average cost

claim: Belgium's 2013 law bans habitual ticket resale outright and bans occasional resale above face value — secondary platforms operating in Belgium are legally constrained, currently under EU Court of Justice review with Viagogo intervening.
quote: Belgium has a 2013 law governing ticket transactions that bans 'regular' (habitual) resale outright, and also bans 'occasional' resale above the initial price.

claim: Viagogo has been called out by Euroconsumers for Digital Services Act violations including false-scarcity tactics and 10-minute pressure prompts; buyers face risks of invalid tickets and being turned away at the door.
quote: Viagogo has failed to comply with several key provisions of the EU's Digital Services Act legislation, with consistent contraventions leaving ticket buyers exposed to manipulation and high prices.

claim: Sportpaleis Antwerp has been rebranded AFAS Dome and is Belgium's flagship arena for major pop tours; in-venue beer is €5/half-litre Jupiler.
quote: AFAS Dome (formerly Sportpaleis) Antwerp | The biggest pop stars live in concert | Tickets and practical info

claim: ING Arena (formerly Palais 12) in Brussels is a 12,000-capacity venue on the Heysel plateau hosting major arena tours and is well-served by metro and tram.
Walking distance dinner options to De Bijloke include Otium Cucina Italiana (0.4 mi, 4.5 stars) and Le Homard Rouge (0.3 mi, Belgian seafood) — both within an easy stroll before showtime.
quote: Otium Cucina Italiana (0.4 mi) Italian seafood restaurant with 4.5-star rating ... Le Homard Rouge (0.3 mi) Belgian seafood specialist

claim: Capitole Gent dinner pairings within 200m include Basta Resto (Mediterranean fusion in Zuidstationstraat near Sint-Annaplein) and Mister Spaghetti (Botermarkt 2) for casual pre-show dining.
quote: Basta Resto lies within walking distance (200 meters) of Capitole Gent, in the Zuidstationstraat near Sint-Annaplein.

claim: Near AFAS Dome / Sportpaleis Antwerp, Pampas Rodizio (Lange Lobroekstraat 105-111) is a recommended pre-event dining option, with Portugees Van Deurne (Cogelsplein 29) about a mile away.
quote: Pampas Rodizio is available for events at Sportpaleis, located at Lange Lobroekstraat 105-111, 2060 Antwerp

claim: NTGent on Sint-Baafsplein offers an in-house terrace café with drinks and light bites (croque monsieur etc.) and a Multipass of 10 tickets for €220 (€22/ticket) for theatre regulars.
quote: With a Multipass, you can flexibly book your own theatre tickets throughout the season, with a Multipass for 10 tickets costing 220 euros

claim: De Bijloke is a concert hall set in a 13th-century hospital with its own in-house café designed by Studio Helder and ONBETAALBAAR, a stone's throw from Ghent city centre.
quote: The entrance leads through a Café, which functions as a lively meeting place thanks to original interior design by Antwerp's Studio Helder and ONBETAALBAAR

claim: Capitole Gent is an iconic art-deco theatre programming comedy, musicals and concerts, with onsite bars and a restaurant for pre-show drinks/dining.
quote: Capitole Gent | Comedy, musicals & concerts in an iconic art-deco theater | Tickets and practical info
